interpretation.equation_reason: A dependency has XOR(A_i)=0, so its syndrome contains only XOR(error_i), not a coefficient of S.
interpretation.reason: All found dependencies are dense; parity-noise bias is negligible, so common-S and unrelated labels both predict uniform syndromes.
interpretation.statistics_limit: Elimination checks overlap, so the displayed z-score is descriptive and is not a calibrated p-value.
